data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of status transitions during recovery (degraded -> healthy). However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks related to the status transitions, indicating a clear gap in the necessary data to confirm this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the workflow but do not address the specific need for status transitions during recovery, leading to a failure in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of status transitions during recovery (degraded -> healthy) found.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
